extension.summary: Access your content from Easynews and Debrid Clouds.
extension.description: Mire Sirens is a community-maintained continuation of the Fen Light addon family. This add-on is intended for advanced Kodi users only. You must own the content of any media you play through this addon. This is an English language only add-on.
extension.disclaimer: The author of this addon does not host any of the content which is found and has no affiliation with any of the content providers.
extension.news: v1.0.2 - Fixed Trakt sync breaking due to a Trakt API pagination change: watched movies/shows history AND in-progress/Continue Watching items were being silently truncated (only the most recent ~100/25 items were coming back). Added full pagination support across all three sync calls, and updated the shows-watched query to extended=progress. (Fix based on a community patch for FLAM 2.2.04, credit ReaLx3m.) v1.0.1 - Fixed Trending/Popular TV menus returning empty (null external_ids from TMDB) and Trakt Calendar erroring out on null season/episode data. v1.0.0 - Initial release of Mire Sirens, a clean fork of Fen Light AM. Provider keys removed; users must supply their own Trakt and TMDB credentials. Updater pointed at isleysharleen GitHub.
